mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sms_otp_code (user_id, phone, code, attempt_count, max_attempts, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{phone}, #{code}, #{attemptCount}, #{maxAttempts}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sms_otp_code WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND phone = #{phone} AND verified_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
